name: Chicken Delicious
recipeIngredient: 4 to 6 whole boned and skinned chicken breasts, halved
1 can (10.75 oz) cream of mushroom soup
1 can (10.75 oz) cream of celery soup
1/3 cup dry sherry or white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken breasts and pat them dry.
2. Season with lemon juice, salt, pepper, celery salt, and paprika.
3. Place in a Crock-Pot.
4. In a medium bowl or pan, mix the mushroom and celery soups with sherry.
5. Pour over the chicken breasts.
6. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
7. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 4 to 5 hours.
8. Serve the chicken and sauce over hot fluffy rice.
Serves 8 to 12
